The '''Abyss''' was a podracing course on [[Ord Ibanna]] and the second race of the [[Invitational Podracing Circuit]]. This twisting and infamous course required the racers to be fully alert. When the path spits into an upper path and a lower one, the bottom path loops around the main arena, making it much longer and throws you back a couple places if you fall from the top. This course was the second race in the [[Invitational Podracing Circuit]] tournament. [[Bozzie Baranta]] liked this course.<ref name="racer" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] {{1st}}
